TensorFlow tf.concat expects actual tensor objects, not shape/dtype dicts; PaddlePaddle paddle.concat uses 'x' instead of 'values' parameter. Both frameworks require concrete tensors, so test cases must generate valid tensors with matching shapes and dtypes.
原始用例传入的是shape/dtype字典而非实际Tensor对象，tf.concat和paddle.concat均要求values/x为Tensor列表。需生成真实张量输入，且确保两框架输入一致。

tf.cond_v2 does not exist in modern TensorFlow (replaced by tf.cond); Paddle requires true_fn/false_fn to be callable objects, not strings. Both frameworks need actual lambda functions, not string literals. Also, Paddle requires pred to be a Tensor, not just a shape/dtype spec.
TensorFlow报错因tf.cond_v2不存在，应使用tf.cond；Paddle报错因true_fn/false_fn传入字符串而非可调用对象，需去除引号使其为lambda表达式。两框架均要求函数参数为callable，且pred为标量bool Tensor。
